printed.name: Swan Single Arm
printed.setup: Lying prone on Wunda Chair, arms straight, one hand placed on pedal, shoulder over wrist (as close as possible), other arm out to side, palm facing down, legs straight and together, body parallel to floor

movement.exhale: Lower trunk, pressing pedal down, return to start position

cues: Maximize spinal articulation in both directions
Keep legs and outstretched arm stable
Press hands into pedal when lifting using shoulder extensors
